workflow.name: Generate SEO content and marketing copy with Claude, Serper, Sheets and SendGrid
workflow.description:
Generates SEO blog posts, ad copy, email sequences, and social captions using Claude AI.

## Setup
1. Add your ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in the Set Config node
2. Configure Serper API key for SEO data (optional)
3. Set your WordPress, Mailchimp, Airtable credentials
4. POST to the webhook URL

## Webhook Payload
```
{
  "topic": "Best AI Tools 2025",
  "contentType": "blog_post",
  "keyword": "ai tools for marketing",
  "tone": "professional",
  "audience": "SMB marketers",
  "wordCount": 1500,
  "brand": "YourBrand",
  "clientEmail": "client@email.com"
}
```

## Content Types
- blog_post
- ad_copy
- email_sequence
- social_captions

## Flow

**The simplified flow (9 active nodes):**

```
Receive Brief → Set Config → Fetch SERP Data → Build Claude Prompt
→ Call Claude AI → Parse Claude Response → Save to Google Sheets
                                         → Send Delivery Email
                                         → Send Response
```

**After importing, replace these 5 values in the `Set Config` node:**

| Field | Replace with |
|---|---|
| `YOUR_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` | Your Anthropic key |
| `YOUR_SERPER_API_KEY` | Your Serper.dev key (free tier works) |
| `YOUR_SENDGRID_API_KEY` | Your SendGrid key |
| `YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEET_ID` | Your Sheet ID from the URL |
| `YOUR_GSHEETS_CREDENTIAL_ID` | Set up Google Sheets OAuth in n8n credentials |

The workflow handles all 4 content types (`blog_post`, `ad_copy`, `email_sequence`, `social_captions`) through a single Claude call with type-specific prompts — no branching needed.

parameters.content:
# Jasper AI Content Creator

Generates SEO blog posts, ad copy, email sequences, and social captions using Claude AI.

## Setup
1. Add your ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in the Set Config node
2. Configure Serper API key for SEO data (optional)
3. Set your WordPress, Mailchimp, Airtable credentials
4. POST to the webhook URL

## Webhook Payload
```
{
  "topic": "Best AI Tools 2025",
  "contentType": "blog_post",
  "keyword": "ai tools for marketing",
  "tone": "professional",
  "audience": "SMB marketers",
  "wordCount": 1500,
  "brand": "YourBrand",
  "clientEmail": "client@email.com"
}
```

## Content Types
- blog_post
- ad_copy
- email_sequence
- social_captions

## Flow
Webhook -> Config -> SEO Fetch -> Build Prompt -> Claude AI -> Parse Response -> Save to Sheet -> Send Email -> Respond

## Stage 1 - Intake
Webhook receives brief, Set node stores config values, HTTP node fetches top Google results for the keyword to give Claude competitor context.

## Stage 2 - Generate
Code node builds the Claude prompt based on content type. HTTP Request calls Anthropic API. Another Code node parses the response and extracts clean content + SEO metadata.

## Stage 3 - Publish
Google Sheets logs every job. HTTP Request sends delivery email via SendGrid. Webhook responds with JSON summary including SEO score, meta title, and content preview.

parameters.jsCode:
var cfg = $('Set Config').first().json;
var serp = $('Fetch SERP Data').first().json;

var competitors = '';
try {
  var organic = serp.organic || [];
  competitors = organic.slice(0,4).map(function(r){ return '- ' + r.title; }).join('
');
} catch(e) { competitors = 'No competitor data'; }

var type = cfg.contentType || 'blog_post';
var prompts = {};

prompts['blog_post'] = 'Write a ' + cfg.wordCount + '-word SEO blog post.
Topic: ' + cfg.topic + '
Keyword (use 3-5 times): ' + cfg.keyword + '
Tone: ' + cfg.tone + '
Audience: ' + cfg.audience + '
Brand: ' + cfg.brand + '
Competitor titles to beat:
' + competitors + '

Structure: H1 with keyword > intro hook > 4-5 H2 sections > FAQ (3 questions) > conclusion with CTA.

End with:
META_TITLE: (max 55 chars)
META_DESC: (max 155 chars)
SEO_SCORE: (0-100 number only)';

prompts['ad_copy'] = 'Write high-converting ad copy.
Product/Topic: ' + cfg.topic + '
Keyword: ' + cfg.keyword + '
Brand: ' + cfg.brand + '
Audience: ' + cfg.audience + '

Provide:
1. GOOGLE ADS - 3 sets of (Headline 1 max30, Headline 2 max30, Headline 3 max30, Desc 1 max90, Desc 2 max90)
2. META ADS - 3 variations of (Primary text max125, Headline max40, Description max30)
3. EMAIL SUBJECTS - 3 subject lines with preview text

End with:
META_TITLE: best headline as meta title
META_DESC: best description
SEO_SCORE: 65';

prompts['email_sequence'] = 'Write a 4-email drip sequence.
Topic: ' + cfg.topic + '
Brand: ' + cfg.brand + '
Audience: ' + cfg.audience + '
Tone: ' + cfg.tone + '

Email 1 (send immediately): Welcome - subject, preview, body 180 words, CTA
Email 2 (day 2): Value Nurture - subject, preview, body 200 words, CTA
Email 3 (day 4): Social Proof - subject, preview, body 200 words, CTA
Email 4 (day 7): Sales Close - subject, preview, body 250 words, CTA

Use {{first_name}} for personalization.

End with:
META_TITLE: Email sequence title
META_DESC: Sequence description
SEO_SCORE: 70';

prompts['social_captions'] = 'Write social media content.
Topic: ' + cfg.topic + '
Brand: ' + cfg.brand + '
Audience: ' + cfg.audience + '
Tone: ' + cfg.tone + '

1. LINKEDIN POST (1000-1300 chars, professional, line breaks, CTA, 3 hashtags)
2. TWITTER THREAD (5 tweets max 280 chars each, hook first, end with CTA)
3. TWITTER STANDALONE (1 viral tweet max 280 chars)
4. INSTAGRAM CAPTION (with emoji, storytelling, CTA, 25 hashtags at end)
5. INSTAGRAM CAROUSEL (5 slides: slide headline + 2 bullet points each)

End with:
META_TITLE: Best headline from above
META_DESC: Best caption summary
SEO_SCORE: 72';

var prompt = prompts[type] || prompts['blog_post'];

return [{ json: {
  topic: cfg.topic,
  contentType: cfg.contentType,
  keyword: cfg.keyword,
  tone: cfg.tone,
  audience: cfg.audience,
  wordCount: cfg.wordCount,
  brand: cfg.brand,
  clientEmail: cfg.clientEmail,
  jobId: cfg.jobId,
  anthropicKey: cfg.anthropicKey,
  sendgridKey: cfg.sendgridKey,
  claudePrompt: prompt,
  competitors: competitors
}}];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: "claude-sonnet-4-20250514", max_tokens: 4000, system: "You are a world-class marketing copywriter and SEO expert. Always follow the exact format requested.", messages: [{ role: "user", content: $json.claudePrompt }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ personalizations: [{ to: [{ email: $json.clientEmail || "client@example.com" }] }], from: { email: "noreply@youragency.com", name: "Content Engine" }, subject: "Content ready: " + $json.topic, content: [{ type: "text/plain", value: "Your content is ready!

Job: " + $json.jobId + "
Type: " + $json.contentType + "
Topic: " + $json.topic + "
SEO Score: " + $json.seoScore + "/100
Meta Title: " + $json.metaTitle + "

Content Preview:
" + ($json.generatedContent || "").substring(0, 500) + "..." }] }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, jobId: $json.jobId, contentType: $json.contentType, topic: $json.topic, seoScore: $json.seoScore, metaTitle: $json.metaTitle, metaDesc: $json.metaDesc, slug: $json.slug, estimatedValue: $json.estimatedValue, contentLength: $json.contentLength, generatedAt: $json.generatedAt }) }}

user.name: Oneclick AI Squad
user.bio: The AI Squad Initiative is a pioneering effort to build, automate and scale AI-powered workflows using n8n.io. Our mission is to help individuals and businesses integrate AI agents seamlessly into their daily operations  from automating tasks and enhancing productivity to creating innovative, intelligent solutions. We design modular, reusable AI workflow templates that empower creators, developers and teams to supercharge their automation with minimal effort and maximum impact.
